message:
feat(stdlib): Enhance io and functools modules

io module (Lib/io.zig):
- Add StringIO/BytesIO with full method support
- read(), readSize(n), readline(), readlineSize(n)
- readlines(), write(), writelines()
- seek(), seekWhence(), tell(), truncate(), truncateSize()
- State checks: readable(), writable(), seekable(), closed()
- Compatibility: flush(), close(), isatty(), fileno()
- SEEK_SET, SEEK_CUR, SEEK_END constants

functools module (Modules/_functools.zig):
- Add Cache struct for unbounded caching (functools.cache)
- Add WRAPPER_ASSIGNMENTS and WRAPPER_UPDATES constants
- Now 7/14 functions (50% coverage)

Method dispatch (dispatch/method_calls.zig):
- Handle read/readline with optional size arg
- Handle seek with optional whence arg
- Handle truncate with optional size arg

Also: Fix banker's rounding in pyRound for Python compatibility
